basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Rajkot. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Rajkot Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 10 years, Govt Servant: 5 years, Ex-Serviceman: 5 years.

qualification.details: Educational qualification included in I or II Schedule or Part II of third Schedule to Indian Medical Council Act 1956/Persons with Disability Act. Postgraduate qualification e.g. MD/MS or recognized qualification equivalent thereto. For general discipline: Three years teaching and/or research experience in a recognized institution after obtaining MD/MS or qualification recognized equivalent thereto. For superspeciality: One year teaching/research experience after MD/MS.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Rajkot to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
